zh.Bashall Eaves, Lancashire, England, Unit: 英國英格蘭越可爾巴沙拉爾 伊夫斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas Talbot II於1307年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾巴沙拉爾 伊夫斯時，他的父親Sir Edmund Talbot48歲，母親Joan de Holland28歲。他於1328年與Elizabeth Bellard在英國越可爾巴沙拉爾 伊夫斯結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1366年在他的家鄉享年59歲。

nameMeanings.name: Talbot
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Emile, Marcel, Anatole, Armand, Aubert, Camille, Gilles, Normand, Adrien, Alcide, Andre, Auguste.
English and Irish (of Norman origin); French: from the Anglo-Norman French personal name Talebot, a pet form of Old French Talebert, Talbert (see Talbert 1). Compare Talbert 2.
French: from the ancient Germanic personal name Talbald, composed of the elements dal ‘bright, proud’ or tal ‘valley’ + bald ‘bold’.

variants.name: Talbert
meanings: English and Scottish (of Norman origin); French: from the Old French personal name Talebert, Talbert, from ancient Germanic Talaberht or Dalbert, composed of the elements dal ‘bright, proud’ or tal ‘valley’ + berht ‘bright’.
Altered form of English   Talbot  , a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Talbott
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Talbot  .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas Talbot II was born in 1307, in Bashall Eaves, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Edmund Talbot, was 48 and his mother, Joan de Holland, was 28. He married Elizabeth Bellard in 1328, in Bashall Eaves, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1366, in his hometown, at the age of 59.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas Talbot II est né en 1307, à Bashall Eaves, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Edmund Talbot, avait 48 ans et sa mère, Joan de Holland, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Bellard en 1328, à Bashall Eaves, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1366, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 59 ans.

de.Bashall Eaves, Lancashire, England, Unit: Bashall Eaves, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Thomas Talbot II 1307 in Bashall Eaves, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Edmund Talbot 48 und seine Mutter Joan de Holland 28. Er hat 1328 in Bashall Eaves, Yorkshire, England Elizabeth Bellard geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1366 im Alter von 59 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

Lui sposato Elizabeth Bellard nel 1328, nel Bashall Eaves, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1366, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 59 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Talbot IIが1307年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアバシャル エエイベスで生まれた時，父Sir Edmund Talbotは48歳，母Joan de Hollandは28歳であった。1328年にイギリスヨークシュアイアバシャル エエイベスでElizabeth Bellardと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1366年に故郷で59歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Talbot II(이)가 1307년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 배샤 이브스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Edmund Talbot(은)는 48세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan de Holland(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1328년 영국 요르크실르 배샤 이브스에서 Elizabeth Bellard(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1366년 그의 고향에서 59세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Talbot II nasceu em 1307, em Bashall Eaves, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Edmund Talbot, tinha 48 anos e sua mãe, Joan de Holland, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Bellard em 1328, em Bashall Eaves, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1366, em sua cidade natal, com 59 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas Talbot II родился в 1307 г. в местности башолл эавесь, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Edmund Talbot было 48 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan de Holland, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Bellard в 1328 г. в местности башолл эавесь, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1366 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 59 лет.

Se casó con Elizabeth Bellard en 1328, en Bashall Eaves, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1366, en su pueblo, a la edad de 59 años.
